title: About
text: My name is Noora Mohamed, I am a junior at the University of Nebraska, Lincoln. I double major in Sports media and Journalism, with a minor in Communication studies and Textile, Merchandising fashion design. I recently started my masters in Integrated media Communication at UNL.
